DASHBOARD.NO_PENDING_APPROVALS: No items pending approval at this time.

SYSTEM.NO_DATA_TABLES_REGISTERED: No data tables registered for this entity.

HELP.SEARCH_DESC: Use this field to search or filter the table records.
HELP.CLIENTS_CONTRACTS_DESC: View and manage all registered clients and their contracts.
HELP.LOANS_PORTFOLIO_DESC: Monitor the active loan portfolio and applications.
HELP.GROUPS_DESC: Manage community groups and self-help groups for micro-lending.
HELP.CENTERS_DESC: Organize groups into centers for administrative efficiency.
HELP.LOAN_PRODUCTS_DESC: Configure and manage loan products available for lending operations.
HELP.SAVINGS_PRODUCTS_DESC: Configure and manage savings and deposit products for banking operations.
HELP.ASSET_OWNERS_DESC: Manage external asset owners and securitized loan transfers.
HELP.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESC: Configure the general ledger structure and chart of accounts.
HELP.LEGAL_FORM_DESC: The legal structure of the client (e.g., individual person or business entity).
HELP.FIRST_NAME_DESC: The given name of the client.
HELP.LAST_NAME_DESC: The family name of the client.
HELP.EXTERNAL_ID_DESC: A reference ID from an external system.
HELP.OFFICE_DESC: The branch office this entity belongs to.
HELP.ACTIVATION_DATE_DESC: The date when this account or entity becomes operational.
HELP.ACTIVE_DESC: Whether this record is currently active in the system.
HELP.PRODUCT_NAME_DESC: The full name of the financial product.
HELP.SHORT_NAME_DESC: A 4-character unique identifier for the product.
HELP.DESCRIPTION_DESC: A detailed explanation of the product's purpose and rules.
HELP.CURRENCY_DESC: The currency in which transactions are processed.
HELP.DECIMAL_PLACES_DESC: The number of digits to show after the decimal point.
HELP.PRINCIPAL_DESC: The base loan amount to be disbursed.
HELP.INTEREST_RATE_DESC: The percentage charged for borrowing money.
HELP.NOMINAL_ANNUAL_INTEREST_RATE_DESC: The yearly interest rate for savings deposits.
HELP.CLIENT_ID_DESC: The unique ID of the client applying for the loan.
HELP.SUBMITTED_ON_DESC: The date the application was received.
HELP.EXPECTED_DISBURSEMENT_DESC: The planned date for funds to be transferred.
HELP.TERM_FREQUENCY_DESC: The duration of the loan term.
HELP.TERM_TYPE_DESC: The units for the loan term (e.g., Months, Years).
HELP.REPAYMENTS_COUNT_DESC: The total number of installments to repay the loan.
HELP.REPAYMENT_EVERY_DESC: How often repayments are due (e.g., every 1 month).
HELP.ENABLE_DOWN_PAYMENT_DESC: Whether to require an initial payment from the borrower.
HELP.GROUP_NAME_DESC: The name of the community group.
HELP.CENTER_NAME_DESC: The name of the administrative center.
HELP.OFFICE_NAME_DESC: The full name of the branch office.
HELP.PARENT_OFFICE_DESC: The higher-level office this branch reports to.
HELP.OPENING_DATE_DESC: The date the branch office was established.
HELP.ACCOUNT_NAME_DESC: The descriptive name for this General Ledger account.
HELP.GL_CODE_DESC: The unique accounting code for the ledger entry.
HELP.ACCOUNT_TYPE_DESC: The classification of the account (e.g., Asset, Liability).
HELP.ACCOUNT_USAGE_DESC: Whether the account is a summary Header or a transactional Detail.
HELP.ALLOW_MANUAL_ENTRIES_DESC: Whether users can post manual journal entries to this account.
HELP.TELLERS_DESC: Manage tellers and cashier operations for branch offices.
HELP.SAVINGS_ACCOUNTS_DESC: View and manage customer savings and deposit accounts.
HELP.SAVINGS_PRODUCT_DESC: The savings product that defines the rules for this account.
HELP.TRANSACTION_DATE_DESC: The date when the financial transaction occurred.
HELP.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DESC: The monetary value of the transaction.
HELP.PAYMENT_TYPE_DESC: The mode of payment (e.g. Cash, Check, Transfer).
HELP.NOTE_DESC: Optional remarks or internal notes regarding the transaction.
HELP.FIXED_DEPOSITS_DESC: Manage customer term deposit and fixed investment accounts.
HELP.FIXED_DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_DESC: The fixed deposit product that defines interest and maturity rules.
HELP.DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_DESC: The initial amount invested in the fixed deposit.
HELP.DEPOSIT_PERIOD_DESC: The duration for which the funds are locked.
HELP.PERIOD_FREQUENCY_DESC: The time unit for the deposit period (e.g. Months, Years).
HELP.CASHIERS_DESC: View and manage staff assigned as cashiers to this teller.
HELP.CASHIER_STAFF_DESC: The staff member assigned to this cashier role.
HELP.CASHIER_FULL_TIME_DESC: Whether this cashier is assigned full-time or for a specific shift.
HELP.RECURRING_DEPOSITS_DESC: Manage customer recurring deposit and long-term savings plans.
HELP.RECURRING_DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_DESC: The recurring deposit product that defines interest and interval rules.
HELP.RECURRING_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_DESC: The recommended amount to be deposited at each interval.
HELP.INHERIT_CALENDAR_DESC: Inherit meeting calendar from group/center for deposit schedule.
HELP.RECURRING_FREQUENCY_DESC: The interval frequency for making recurring deposits.
HELP.FREQUENCY_TYPE_DESC: The time unit for recurring deposit frequency (e.g. Days, Weeks, Months, Years).
HELP.SHARE_ACCOUNTS_DESC: View and manage customer share capital and equity investment accounts.
HELP.SHARE_PRODUCT_DESC: The share product that defines unit price and lock-in period rules.
HELP.REQUESTED_SHARES_DESC: The number of shares the client is applying to purchase.
HELP.APPLICATION_DATE_DESC: The date when the share purchase application was submitted.
HELP.SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_ID_DESC: The savings account to be used for dividend payments and purchase funding.
HELP.COLLATERAL_DESC: Collateral assets pledged by the borrower to secure the loan.
HELP.COLLATERAL_TYPE_DESC: The category of collateral asset (e.g., Gold, Property, Vehicle).
HELP.COLLATERAL_VALUE_DESC: The estimated market value of the collateral asset.
HELP.JOURNAL_ENTRIES_DESC: Record and review manual ledger transactions and system-generated accounting logs.
HELP.ACCOUNTING_CLOSURES_DESC: Close accounting periods for offices to prevent further manual journal entries.
HELP.ACCOUNTING_RULES_DESC: Define preset accounting entries to simplify manual journal entry posting.
HELP.FINANCIAL_ACTIVITY_MAPPINGS_DESC: Map specific financial activities (like Main Vault) to appropriate GL accounts.
HELP.CHARGES_DESC: Manage global configuration for fees and penalties applied to accounts.
HELP.RESCHEDULING_DESC: Manage loan rescheduling requests to alter repayment timelines.
HELP.RESCHEDULE_FROM_DESC: The date from which the new repayment schedule should take effect.
HELP.USERS_DESC: Manage system users and their access to the application.
HELP.ROLES_DESC: Define functional roles and assign granular permissions for access control.
HELP.REPORTS_DESC: Access and run system-defined and custom business reports.
HELP.GLOBAL_CONFIG_DESC: Enable or disable global system features and behaviors.
HELP.HOLIDAYS_DESC: Define and manage non-working days and holiday schedules.
HELP.WORKING_DAYS_DESC: Configure the standard operational week for the institution.
HELP.TELLER_NAME_DESC: A unique name to identify this teller.
HELP.TELLER_OFFICE_DESC: The branch office this teller belongs to.
HELP.TELLER_START_DATE_DESC: The date from when the teller becomes active.
HELP.TELLER_STATUS_DESC: The current operational status of the teller.
HELP.TELLER_USAGE_DESC: The usage category for this teller.
HELP.TELLER_DESCRIPTION_DESC: A detailed description of this branch teller.
HELP.HOLIDAY_NAME_DESC: A unique name for the holiday.
HELP.APPLICABLE_OFFICES_DESC: Select the branch offices to which this holiday applies.
HELP.FROM_DATE_DESC: The start date of the holiday period.
HELP.TO_DATE_DESC: The end date of the holiday period.
HELP.REPAYMENTS_RESCHEDULED_TO_DESC: The target date to reschedule any loan repayments falling on this holiday.
HELP.HOLIDAY_DESCRIPTION_DESC: Optional details or comments about this holiday.
HELP.RESCHEDULING_TYPE_DESC: Specify how repayments falling on this holiday should be rescheduled.
HELP.MIDDLE_NAME_DESC: The client's middle name, if any.
HELP.LOAN_PRODUCT_DESC: Select the loan product this application is based on.
HELP.FUNDS_DESC: Funds are sources of money that can be linked to loans for tracking and reporting.
HELP.WC_BREACH_DESC: Covenant breach definitions set the amount and frequency thresholds that flag a working-capital loan as breached.
HELP.WC_NEAR_BREACH_DESC: Near-breach definitions trigger early-warning alerts before a working-capital covenant is fully breached.
HELP.WC_LOANS_DESC: Manage working-capital loan applications: create new loans and view loan details, charges, transactions, and delinquency information.
HELP.WC_LOAN_PRODUCTS_DESC: Manage working-capital loan products including currency, principal, repayment frequency and amortization settings.
HELP.LOAN_ORIGINATORS_DESC: Manage loan originators — the brokers, agents, and channels that source loan applications.
HELP.COLLATERAL_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Manage collateral products used to secure loans, including quality, unit type, base price, and currency.
HELP.BULK_REASSIGNMENT_DESC: Reassign all loans from one loan officer to another within an office.
HELP.GUARANTORS_DESC: Manage the guarantors attached to this loan.
HELP.INTEREST_PAUSES_DESC: Periods during which no interest accrues on this loan.
HELP.POST_DATED_CHECKS_DESC: Post-dated checks recorded against this loan's repayment schedule.
HELP.CLIENT_CHARGES_DESC: Charges applied directly to this client.
HELP.CLIENT_TRANSACTIONS_DESC: Financial transactions recorded against this client.
HELP.MEETINGS_DESC: Meetings record the attendance taken against a group or center's collection calendar.
HELP.CALENDARS_DESC: Calendars define the recurring meeting schedule for a group or center.
HELP.GROUP_LEVELS_DESC: Group levels define the hierarchy of group entities, such as Center and Group, and whether each level can hold clients.
HELP.RATES_DESC: Define interest rates that can be applied to products.
HELP.INTEREST_RATE_CHARTS_DESC: Manage interest rate charts and their interest-rate slabs (bands).
HELP.PRODUCT_MIX_DESC: Define which loan products are restricted when this loan product is used.
HELP.SAVINGS_CHARGES_DESC: Manage the charges applied to this savings account.
HELP.SHARE_DIVIDENDS_DESC: Manage the dividends declared for this share product.
HELP.FIXED_DEPOSIT_TRANSACTIONS_DESC: View deposit and withdrawal transactions for this fixed deposit account.
HELP.RECURRING_DEPOSIT_TRANSACTIONS_DESC: Record a deposit transaction against this recurring deposit account.
HELP.ON_HOLD_TRANSACTIONS_DESC: View funds held on this savings account as a result of loan guarantees.
HELP.PROVISIONING_CATEGORIES_DESC: Define provisioning categories used to classify loan loss provisions.
HELP.PROVISIONING_CRITERIA_DESC: Define provisioning criteria that map loan products and categories to provisioning percentages and GL accounts.
HELP.PROVISIONING_ENTRIES_DESC: View generated provisioning entries and create new ones for a given date.
HELP.RUN_ACCRUALS_DESC: Execute periodic accrual accounting for all eligible loan and savings products up to the selected date.
HELP.CASHIER_JOURNALS_DESC: View cash receipt and payment journal entries recorded for a teller's cashier.
HELP.HOOKS_DESC: Configure outbound hooks that notify external systems when Fineract events occur.
HELP.ADHOC_QUERY_DESC: Define ad-hoc SQL queries that can be scheduled to populate report tables.
HELP.SMS_DESC: View and send individual SMS messages to clients, groups, or staff.
HELP.REPORT_MAILING_JOBS_DESC: Schedule reports to be generated and emailed to recipients.
HELP.ENTITY_DATA_TABLE_CHECKS_DESC: Require data-table entries to be completed at specific entity workflow statuses.
HELP.ENTITY_MAPPING_DESC: Map entities to one another to control cross-entity access and visibility.
HELP.SCHEDULER_JOBS_DESC: View and run scheduled background jobs and control the global scheduler.
HELP.LOAN_PRODUCT_DETAILS_DESC: Basic details of configured loan products.
HELP.SPM_SURVEYS_DESC: Manage social-performance (SPM) surveys and their metadata.
HELP.SCORECARDS_DESC: View scorecard responses collected for a survey.
HELP.MIX_TAXONOMY_DESC: Browse the MIX XBRL taxonomy elements.
HELP.CREDIT_BUREAU_CONFIG_DESC: View the configured credit bureaus and their loan-product mappings.
HELP.POVERTY_LINE_DESC: Look up the poverty-line (PPI) table for a given PPI name.
HELP.LIKELIHOOD_DESC: View and update likelihood (PPI) entries for a given PPI name.
HELP.PAYMENT_TYPES_DESC: Payment types describe how money moves in and out (cash, cheque, transfer).
HELP.TAX_COMPONENTS_DESC: A tax component is a single named tax with a percentage and start date.
HELP.TAX_GROUPS_DESC: A tax group bundles one or more tax components for use on charges.
HELP.FLOATING_RATES_DESC: Floating rates define base/differential interest rates that vary over time periods.

HOLIDAYS.NAME: Holiday Name
HOLIDAYS.ACTIVATE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to activate the holiday '{{name}}'?

JOURNAL_ENTRIES.BALANCED_ERROR: Total debits must equal total credits.

SHARE_ACCOUNTS.PREREQ_CLIENT: Select or create a Client who will own the share account.
SHARE_ACCOUNTS.PREREQ_SAVINGS: The client must have an active Savings Account in the same currency as the Share Product (used for dividends and purchase funding).
SHARE_ACCOUNTS.PREREQ_PRODUCT: Select a Share Product — the available savings accounts will be filtered to match the product currency.
SHARE_ACCOUNTS.NO_SAVINGS_HINT: No matching savings accounts. Ensure the client has a savings account in the same currency as the selected share product.

GUIDE.DASHBOARD_WELCOME_DESC: This guide will walk you through the key areas of the dashboard and how to navigate the backoffice application.
GUIDE.DASHBOARD_ENV_DESC: Here you can monitor the health of the connected Fineract environment, active tenant, and check runtime API configurations.
GUIDE.CLIENTS_DESC: Manage client files, profile details, and linked financial accounts. From here you can create new client registrations.
GUIDE.CLIENTS_SEARCH_DESC: Use this field to quickly filter client records by name, account number, or status.
GUIDE.CLIENTS_CREATE_DESC: Click here to add a new client to the backoffice registry.
GUIDE.CLIENTS_VIEW_DESC: View details about this client, including activation dates, contact details, and their linked financial accounts.
GUIDE.CLIENTS_VIEW_TABS_DESC: Switch between tabs to see the client's Loan Accounts, Savings Accounts, and Share Accounts.
GUIDE.CLIENTS_VIEW_ACTIONS_DESC: Use these buttons to perform operations like client profile editing, account creation, or state transitions.
GUIDE.LOANS_DESC: Track outstanding loan applications, disbursements, and repayments.
GUIDE.LOANS_FILTER_DESC: Filter loan accounts by status, office, staff, or search directly by client or account number.
GUIDE.LOANS_VIEW_DESC: Examine loan summary details, repayment schedules, and transaction histories.
GUIDE.LOANS_VIEW_TABS_DESC: Explore loan details across different tabs such as summary, repayment schedule, transactions, and charges.
GUIDE.SAVINGS_VIEW_DESC: Monitor savings account balance, transaction histories, and compounding options.
GUIDE.SAVINGS_VIEW_TABS_DESC: Switch tabs to view summary, transactions, charges, or linked accounts.
GUIDE.SAVINGS_VIEW_ACTIONS_DESC: Use these actions to approve savings applications, perform deposits, withdrawals, or close the account.
GUIDE.SAVINGS_DESC: Manage savings accounts and long-term deposit applications.
GUIDE.SAVINGS_SEARCH_DESC: Filter savings account records by search parameters or specific statuses.
GUIDE.SAVINGS_CREATE_DESC: Click here to initiate a savings account application for a client.
GUIDE.SHARES_DESC: This page lists all customer share capital accounts. Share accounts represent equity investments in the institution.
GUIDE.SHARES_CREATE_DESC: Click this button to open the share account application form. You will need a client with a savings account in the same currency as the share product.
GUIDE.SHARES_CREATE_FORM_DESC: Fill in this form to submit a share purchase application. The account will start in 'Submitted and pending approval' status.
GUIDE.SHARES_PREREQ_DESC: This banner explains the required steps. The most common issue is a currency mismatch — the client needs a savings account in the same currency as the share product.
GUIDE.SHARES_CLIENT_DESC: Search for and select the client who will own this share account. After selection, the available share products will load.
GUIDE.SHARES_PRODUCT_DESC: Choose the share product. This determines the unit price, currency, and rules. Savings accounts will be filtered to match the product currency.
GUIDE.SHARES_SAVINGS_DESC: Select the client's savings account for dividend payments and share purchase funding. Only accounts matching the product currency are shown.

tooltips.serverUrl: The Fineract server address. Use 'Mifos Sandbox' for testing or 'Local' for your own instance.
tooltips.tenantId: A unique ID for the financial institution. Default is 'default'. This is passed via the Fineract-Platform-TenantId header.

warning.title: Session Expiring
warning.message: You have been inactive for a while. Your session will expire soon. Do you want to stay logged in?

PROVISIONING_CRITERIA.NAME: Criteria Name
PROVISIONING_CRITERIA.DEFINITIONS_NOTE: Per-category provisioning definitions and loan-product mappings are managed through the API and are preserved when editing the criteria name.

BUSINESS_STEPS.TITLE: Business Step Configuration
BUSINESS_STEPS.NO_STEPS: No steps configured for this job.

PAYMENT_TYPES.NAME: Name
PAYMENT_TYPES.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this payment type?
